title: ardisia croatii subsp. croatii
intro: Ardisia croatii subsp. croatii, also known as Croat's ardisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is a shrub native to Cuba and the island of Hispaniola. The medicinal properties of Ardisia croatii subsp. croatii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions to treat ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
